parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
const relevantFiles = JSON.stringify(item.context.selected_files || [], null, 2);
const prompt = `Implement the task in the repository below.

Task understanding:
${item.plan.task_understanding || ''}

Acceptance criteria:
${(item.task.acceptance_criteria || []).join('
')}

Relevant files:
${relevantFiles}

Rules:
- Return SEARCH/REPLACE blocks only
- Use this exact block format:
  ===FILE:path/to/file===
  <<<<<<< SEARCH
  old text
  =======
  new text
  >>>>>>> REPLACE
- Each SEARCH block must match exactly once in the target file
- Include enough surrounding context to make the match unique
- Modify only necessary files
- Keep changes small
- Do not add deploy logic
- Do not rewrite unrelated code`;
return [{ json: { ...item, prompt, llm_stage: 'patch' } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, run: { ...item.run, repair_attempts: Number(item.run.repair_attempts || 0) + 1 } } }];

const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: item.final || { status: 'stopped', stop_reason: 'final payload missing' } }];
